user1.name: Alex Chen
user1.content: This test gave me a whole new understanding of myself. The results are incredibly accurate! I recommend it to anyone who wants to know themselves better.

user2.name: Sarah Wang
user2.content: The interface is beautifully designed, and the testing process is fun. The result analysis showed me my strengths and areas for improvement.

user3.name: Mike Zhang
user3.content: As a rational person, I was skeptical about psychological tests. But the results of this test really surprised me - it's so accurate!

cta.title: Ready to Discover Your True Self?
cta.description: Start your first psychological test now and discover the unique personality hidden deep within you.

personality-type.title: Your Personality Type Test
personality-type.description: Discover your unique personality traits and behavioral patterns through 10 interesting questions.

options.text: Actively talk to strangers and become the center of attention
Chat with a few familiar friends
Find a quiet corner and observe your surroundings

questions.text: When making decisions, you rely more on:
When it comes to plans and arrangements, you tend to:

options.text: Plan ahead and follow the plan
Stay flexible and adapt to changes
Have a rough plan but allow adjustments

questions.text: You prefer a work environment that is:
When someone shares their troubles with you, you usually:

options.text: First empathize and understand their feelings
Share similar experiences of your own

questions.text: In team projects, you usually play the role of:

options.text: Organizer - assigning tasks and ensuring progress
Creator - providing new ideas and directions
Spend time alone to organize your thoughts

analyst.title: The Analytical Thinker (INTJ/INTP)
analyst.description: You are an independent, rational, and insightful thinker. You excel at strategic planning and systems analysis, and enjoy deeply understanding complex concepts. At work, you pursue efficiency and innovation, and can see patterns and possibilities that others miss. Your strengths lie in logical thinking and long-term vision, but you may sometimes appear too rational or insufficiently attentive to others' feelings.

diplomat.title: The Idealist (INFJ/INFP)
diplomat.description: You are an empathetic, creative, and idealistic person. You deeply understand others' emotions and needs, and excel at building deep relationships. You pursue meaning and purpose, and enjoy helping others grow and develop. Your strengths lie in intuition and empathy, but you may sometimes be too idealistic or easily hurt.

sentinel.title: The Guardian (ISTJ/ISFJ)
sentinel.description: You are a reliable, practical, and responsible person. You value tradition and order, and excel at establishing stable systems and processes. You are the backbone of any team, always completing tasks on time and ensuring quality. Your strengths lie in reliability and focus, but you may sometimes be too conservative or resistant to change.

explorer.title: The Explorer (ISTP/ISFP)
explorer.description: You are a flexible, adaptable, and experience-oriented person. You live in the present, and excel at handling unexpected situations and practical problems. You enjoy hands-on practice and have keen observation of your surroundings. Your strengths lie in flexibility and pragmatism, but you may sometimes be too impulsive or lack long-term planning.

executive.title: The Executive (ESTJ/ENTJ)
executive.description: You are a decisive, confident, and organized leader. You excel at making plans, assigning tasks, and ensuring goals are met. You enjoy challenges and competition, and can stay calm under pressure. Your strengths lie in decision-making and execution, but you may sometimes be too assertive or insufficiently considerate of others' feelings.

campaigner.title: The Campaigner (ENFJ/ENFP)
campaigner.description: You are an enthusiastic, charismatic, and inspiring person. You enjoy social activities and can easily connect with all kinds of people. You are full of energy and creativity, and always see the positive side of things. Your strengths lie in social skills and charisma, but you may sometimes spread yourself too thin or have difficulty focusing.
